results.teaser: JSN earns 90% below market. Our panel breaks the four extension paths and the $33M mistake Seattle must avoid.
The Chiefs traded for the NFL’s most debated young QB at $3M. A dynasty bet or a stall?
Sean Payton built contenders around the middle of the field. Denver’s Super Bowl push may hinge on one tight end bet.
The largest dead cap hit in NFL history. Our panel dissects how Miami rebuilds from a $99M ghost.
Cap says $27M. The agent demands $33M. Our experts re-examine Seattle’s most important extension decision.
The Rams spent $160 million on their secondary. Our panel debates whether this rebuild can survive the NFC West arms race.
San Francisco lost their pass rush, their receivers, and their margin for error. Our panel examines what’s left of the dynasty.
Arizona released Kyler Murray and ate $47.5M in dead cap. Our panel explains why they should have done it sooner.
The Patriots have ~$44 million, the #31 pick, and a franchise QB on a rookie deal. Our panel maps their best offseason moves.
Seattle can solve its running back problem at pick #64 for $6 million. Our panel identifies the top targets and the math behind each pick.
Denver paid a late first for Jaylen Waddle. Our panel says it was worth it — but the $57M bill in 2027 is where the real debate starts.
